misc.title: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez on Iran: Twenty-three years ago, another US administration dragged us into a war in the Middle East. A war that, in theory, it was said at the time, was being fought to elimin
misc.text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez on Iran: Twenty-three years ago, another US administration dragged us into a war in the Middle East. A war that, in theory, it was said at the time, was being fought to eliminate Saddam Hussein's weapons of mass destruction, bring democracy and ensure global security. But which in reality, seen in perspective, produced the opposite effect, it unleashed the greatest wave of insecurity that our continent has suffered since the fall of the Berlin Wall. The Iraq War generated a drastic increase in jihadist terrorism, a serious migration crisis in the Eastern Mediterranean and a generalized increase in energy prices. Video

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1176 I don't want to give my Zoro bros any false hope. But the fact HOW Domi Reversi can be nullified really gives Zoro the perfect opportunity to get his "Cut Off a Dragon's Head" feat, like Ryuma had against a Western dragon(maybe linked to Onigashima too).🔥 #ZKL

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1176 There aren't many options. The main reason for my assumption about Zoro vs. Sommers is the pairing of Holy Knight fights. If Gunko is meant for Luffy/Loki and Sanji fights Kilingham, the
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1176 There aren't many options. The main reason for my assumption about Zoro vs. Sommers is the pairing of Holy Knight fights. If Gunko is meant for Luffy/Loki and Sanji fights Kilingham, then Sommers is the only remaining Holy Knight option for Zoro. Oda always makes it clear that the monster trio always gets the strongest opponents. If Luffy and Sanji fight Holy Knights, you can be 100% sure that Zoro will do the same. Furthermore, Luffy's statement that Sommers should remember Zoro's name fits perfectly for a fight.

items.title: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez on Iran: Twenty-three years ago, another US administration dragged us into a war in the Middle East. A war that, in theory, it was said at the time, was being fought to elimin
items.text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez on Iran: Twenty-three years ago, another US administration dragged us into a war in the Middle East. A war that, in theory, it was said at the time, was being fought to eliminate Saddam Hussein's weapons of mass destruction, bring democracy and ensure global security. But which in reality, seen in perspective, produced the opposite effect, it unleashed the greatest wave of insecurity that our continent has suffered since the fall of the Berlin Wall. The Iraq War generated a drastic increase in jihadist terrorism, a serious migration crisis in the Eastern Mediterranean and a generalized increase in energy prices. Video

items.title: #ONEPIECE1176 There aren't many options. The main reason for my assumption about Zoro vs. Sommers is the pairing of Holy Knight fights. If Gunko is meant for Luffy/Loki and Sanji fights Kilingham, the
items.text: #ONEPIECE1176 There aren't many options. The main reason for my assumption about Zoro vs. Sommers is the pairing of Holy Knight fights. If Gunko is meant for Luffy/Loki and Sanji fights Kilingham, then Sommers is the only remaining Holy Knight option for Zoro. Oda always makes it clear that the monster trio always gets the strongest opponents. If Luffy and Sanji fight Holy Knights, you can be 100% sure that Zoro will do the same. Furthermore, Luffy's statement that Sommers should remember Zoro's name fits perfectly for a fight.
